name: Evil Nightmares
short_description: The Bell is ringing and there is no escape. The world is quickly shrouded in darkness and horrifying creatures lurk for Marv. He must face his fears and find a way out of this nightmare or he will be trapped in hellfire forever.
detailed_description:
The Bell is ringing and there is no escape.

The world is quickly shrouded in darkness and horrifying creatures lurk for Marv.

He must face his fears and find a way out of this nightmare or he will be trapped in hellfire forever.

This is a short 2D survival horror game.

You play as Marv, trapped in a dark world where hostile creatures are always nearby.

Explore the environment, manage limited supplies, and solve some puzzles to progress.

Piece together the hidden story as you fight to stay alive.

supported_languages: English, German, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Japanese
